title: Social Issues
createMetaDescription: Report a social or environmental issue in your community
verificationHint: Vouch for accurate reports or dispute inaccurate ones.

form.title: Title
form.rdgHint: Select at least one RDG that this issue relates to
form.isLocalizableHint: Check if this issue can be shown on a map
form.sourcesHint: Add credible sources (news articles, reports, etc.)
form.descriptionIntro: Document a social or environmental issue and link it to the regenerative development goals

rdgs.9: RDG 9: Regenerative Food and Soil Systems
rdgs.10: RDG 10: Water Cycle and Watershed Integrity
rdgs.15: RDG 15: Inclusive Livelihoods and Meaningful Work
rdgs.23: RDG 23: Open Science and the Knowledge Commons
rdgs.27: RDG 27: Global Early Warning and Foresight Systems

verification.title: Community Verification
verification.disputeReasonPlaceholder: Explain why you believe this issue is inaccurate...

empty.title: No issues found
empty.description: No issues match your current filters.

leanWastes.title: Lean 8 Waste Analysis (optional)
leanWastes.hint: Which types of systemic waste does this issue represent?
leanWastes.TRANSPORTATION: Transportation — unnecessary movement of goods or information
leanWastes.INVENTORY: Inventory — excess resources, backlogs or unprocessed work
leanWastes.MOTION: Motion — unnecessary movement of people or effort
leanWastes.WAITING: Waiting — idle time, delays or blocked processes
leanWastes.OVERPRODUCTION: Overproduction — producing more than needed, ahead of demand
leanWastes.OVERPROCESSING: Overprocessing — doing more work or complexity than required
leanWastes.DEFECTS: Defects — errors, rework and failures requiring correction
leanWastes.SKILLS: Skills — underutilizing people's talent, knowledge or creativity

harmTypes.title: Types of Industrial & Infrastructure Harm (optional)
harmTypes.hint: Select the specific types of harm this issue involves. Covers pollution, ecological damage, and community impacts from factories, infrastructure, and corporate activity.
harmTypes.HARM_AIR_PARTICULATE: Particulate matter (PM2.5 / PM10) — fine dust from combustion, mining, construction
harmTypes.HARM_AIR_NOX: Nitrogen oxides (NOx) — from vehicles, power plants, industrial combustion
harmTypes.HARM_AIR_SOX: Sulfur dioxide (SOx) — acid rain precursor from coal burning and smelting
harmTypes.HARM_AIR_VOC: Volatile organic compounds (VOCs) — from solvents, paints, fuel evaporation
harmTypes.HARM_AIR_HEAVY_METALS: Airborne heavy metals — lead, mercury, cadmium particles from industry
harmTypes.HARM_AIR_CO: Carbon monoxide — from incomplete combustion, vehicle exhaust
harmTypes.HARM_AIR_GHG: Greenhouse gas emissions — CO₂, methane, N₂O contributing to climate breakdown
harmTypes.HARM_AIR_OZONE: Ground-level ozone — photochemical smog from NOx + VOC reactions
harmTypes.HARM_WATER_EFFLUENT: Industrial effluents — untreated factory wastewater discharged to rivers/sea
harmTypes.HARM_WATER_RUNOFF: Chemical runoff — fertilizers, pesticides entering waterways from fields or sites
harmTypes.HARM_WATER_HEAVY_METALS: Heavy metal water contamination — arsenic, lead, mercury in drinking water
harmTypes.HARM_WATER_MICROPLASTICS: Microplastic pollution — industrial microplastics entering water cycles
harmTypes.HARM_WATER_PHARMA: Pharmaceutical contamination — hormones and drug residues in water supply
harmTypes.HARM_WATER_OIL: Oil spills & petroleum leaks — hydrocarbon contamination of aquatic systems
harmTypes.HARM_WATER_THERMAL: Thermal pollution — heated water discharge killing aquatic organisms
harmTypes.HARM_WATER_SEWAGE: Untreated sewage discharge — biological and pathogen contamination
harmTypes.HARM_WATER_EUTROPHICATION: Eutrophication — nutrient overload causing algal blooms and dead zones
harmTypes.HARM_SOIL_HEAVY_METALS: Heavy metal soil contamination — from mining, smelting, industrial sites
harmTypes.HARM_SOIL_PESTICIDES: Pesticide & herbicide accumulation — persistent agrochemicals in soil
harmTypes.HARM_SOIL_POPS: Persistent organic pollutants — dioxins, PCBs, DDT accumulating in soil
harmTypes.HARM_SOIL_PETROLEUM: Petroleum & hydrocarbon contamination — oil spills in land and groundwater
harmTypes.HARM_SOIL_RADIOACTIVE: Radioactive soil contamination — nuclear waste or accident fallout
harmTypes.HARM_SOIL_EROSION: Industrial soil erosion — land degradation from deforestation and extraction
harmTypes.HARM_NOISE_INDUSTRIAL: Industrial machinery noise — factories operating above safe thresholds
harmTypes.HARM_NOISE_TRAFFIC: Traffic & logistics noise — from roads, rail corridors, and freight movement
harmTypes.HARM_NOISE_CONSTRUCTION: Construction & demolition noise — ongoing or repeated disturbance
harmTypes.HARM_NOISE_AIRCRAFT: Aircraft noise — communities under flight paths or near airports
harmTypes.HARM_VIBRATION: Ground vibration — from heavy machinery, blasting, or rail traffic
harmTypes.HARM_LIGHT_POLLUTION: Artificial light pollution — night-time sky glow disrupting ecosystems
harmTypes.HARM_RADIATION_EMF: Electromagnetic field (EMF) radiation — from power lines and cell towers
harmTypes.HARM_RADIATION_NUCLEAR: Ionizing radiation — from nuclear facilities, accidents, or waste sites
harmTypes.HARM_ECO_DEFORESTATION: Deforestation & habitat clearing — for industry, agriculture, or infrastructure
harmTypes.HARM_ECO_BIODIVERSITY: Biodiversity loss — species displacement, extinction pressure from development
harmTypes.HARM_ECO_WETLANDS: Wetland destruction — draining natural flood and water-filtering systems
harmTypes.HARM_ECO_MICROBIOME: Microbiome disruption — industrial chemicals damaging soil and gut ecosystems
harmTypes.HARM_HEALTH_OCCUPATIONAL: Occupational health hazards — worker exposure to toxic or unsafe conditions
harmTypes.HARM_HEALTH_COMMUNITY: Community disease clusters — elevated illness rates near industrial sites
harmTypes.HARM_SOCIAL_DISPLACEMENT: Forced community displacement — populations relocated for industrial projects
harmTypes.HARM_SOCIAL_CULTURAL: Cultural heritage destruction — sacred sites, history, or identity loss
harmTypes.HARM_WASTE_SOLID: Illegal solid waste dumping — accumulation of waste near communities
harmTypes.HARM_WASTE_HAZARDOUS: Hazardous waste mismanagement — toxic materials improperly stored or disposed
harmTypes.HARM_WASTE_EWASTE: Electronic waste (e-waste) — toxic materials from discarded electronics
harmTypes.HARM_WASTE_PLASTIC: Plastic waste accumulation — industrial plastic pollution in environment
harmTypes.HARM_WASTE_NUCLEAR: Nuclear & radioactive waste — long-term storage failures or leakage

errors.unauthorized: You must be logged in to perform this action
errors.forbidden: You don't have permission to perform this action
errors.locationSelectionRequired: Please select a location from the suggestions, or uncheck "Issue has a specific location".

deleteConfirm: Are you sure? This cannot be undone.
